title: carelia glandulifera
intro: Carelia glandulifera, also known as the "Cascara Sagrada," is a plant that belongs to the buckthorn family and is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its high content of anthraquinones and sennosides, which act as a laxative. The health benefits of Carelia glandulifera include promoting regular bowel movements, relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and supporting the overall health of the digestive system. Carelia glandulifera can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and promote a balanced gut microbiome.
